meaning: n.萓ｯ辷ｵ,萓ｯ辷ｵ髟ｿ蟄千噪蟆顔ｧｰ
examples: He was conferred marquess by the king.
It was time to own up to her lies, to confess her deceit to The Marauding Marquess.
Contributions to the Ornithology of South China Part II (by the Marquess Hachisuka, Ph. D.)
Being sexually attracted to both women and men, as the marquess was, is not uncommon.
When the marquess was arrested he could have claimed his right to be judged by his peers.
